response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song titles and credits on screen: 'Kimi ga tame' (キミガタメ) and 'Fuantei na kamisama' (不安定な神様) associated with the 'Utawarerumono' franchise. 2. Simplified search strings: ' "Kimi ga tame" Utawarerumono Japanese and English lyrics ' and ' "Fuantei na kamisama" Utawarerumono Japanese and English lyrics '. 3. Performed searches and successfully retrieved original and English lyrics.
response.global_summary: A two-song medley performed by two VTubers, featuring songs from the Utawarerumono anime series.

scenes.description: The first song of the medley, titled 'Kimi ga tame', begins with two characters singing. The song title and credits appear on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
君の瞳に映る
私は何色ですか
赤深き望むなら
渡そう陽の光を
悲しみが溢れ
瞼閉じました
こぼれた雫は
心に染みゆく
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
When reflected in your eyes
What color am I?
If you wish for deep red
I shall give you the light of the sun
Overflowing with sadness
I closed my eyes
The spilled droplets
Sink deep into my heart

scenes.description: The second song, 'Fuantei na kamisama', begins with the characters singing. The song title and credits appear on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
不安定な神様
繰り返す出会いと別れ
また会えるその日まで
時かける旅人
あなたが泣いている
流るる涙の雨
泣くなとは言わない
心悲しくて
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Unstable God
Repeating meetings and partings
Until the day we can meet again
Time-traveling travelers
You are crying
In the rain of flowing tears
I won't tell you not to cry
Because my heart is sad too
